beforeSnapshot.name: fetchWeather

afterSnapshot.name: fetchWeather
afterSnapshot.purpose: Fetch weather and marine data for a position, returning a Result object.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Convert from throw-based error handling to explicit Result pattern so callers can inspect .ok instead of relying on try/catch.
implementation: Wrap the entire body in try/catch. On success return { ok: true, data }. On API error or unexpected failure return { ok: false, error: { code, message } }.
